border-width.$description: No border by default for fieldset

gap.$description: Space between radio options in the group

margin.$description: No margin by default for fieldset

padding.$description: No padding by default for fieldset

color.$description: Text color for the legend (reuses form field label)

font-family.$description: Font family for the legend (reuses form field label)

font-size.$description: Font size for the legend (reuses form field label)

font-weight.$description: Font weight for the legend (reuses form field label)

line-height.$description: Line height for the legend (reuses form field label)

margin-block-end.$description: Space below the legend before the radio options (uses smaller margin like when description follows)
